_invariant: All edges connect exactly one token node and one protocol node. wstETH-aave_v3-collateral models Lido wstETH as collateral on Aave V3 Ethereum (mono_pool). This snapshot INTENTIONALLY models the oracle source ABSENT/null (a newly-listed asset whose source field is not yet populated, or a transient collector miss) — this is a MODELED FP-trap input, NOT an on-chain state, so it is deliberately unmeasured (an absent field has no block to read). Identical to wsteth_oracle_new.json except oracle.oracle_address is null.

meta.data_source: modeled (NOT measured): oracle source field absent (new-listing / transient collector miss) — an absent field is not an observable on-chain value

metadata._note_wrappers: Lido wrapped staked ETH; rebasing stETH wrapped into a non-rebasing share token (wstETH/stETH ratio grows with staking yield).

meta.data_source: oracle source field ABSENT/null -> models a newly-listed asset (source not yet populated) or a transient collector miss; NOT an observed source swap (deliberately unmeasured FP-trap input)
